message:
Command `
# The or_metrics file from step 38-detailedrouting has errors=1 (from the original first DRT run that had issues).
# Let me check what state_out.json the LibreLane DRT step generates
# by looking at step 38 directory more carefully

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Step 38 directory listing ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/38-openroad-detailedrouting/" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Step 65 (checkantennas after 2nd DRT attempt) ==="
ls -la "$RUN_DIR/65-openroad-checkantennas/" 2>/dev/null | head -10
cat "$RUN_DIR/65-openroad-checkantennas/state_in.json" 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
for k,v in d.items():
    if isinstance(v, str) and len(v) < 200:
        print(f'  {k}: {v}')
" 2>/dev/null
` executed with exit code 0.
